author_rating_explanation: First author Zhen Zhao is affiliated with East China University of Science and Technology, Sun Yat-sen University, Northwestern Polytechnical University, and Jilin University, which are reputable Chinese universities with AI/CS research output, supported by high citation counts (OpenAlex cited_by_count=32008). Last author Jiexin Gao is affiliated with Huawei Technologies (United Kingdom), a major technology company, though citation counts are modest (OpenAlex cited_by_count=205). The combination of strong Chinese university affiliations and a major tech company places this in the 6-8 band.
